mapper.select: SELECT notification_id, recipient_id, doc_id, notification_type, channel, title, content, is_read, created_at FROM platform_v3.cm_notification WHERE recipient_id = #{recipientId} AND is_read = 'N' ORDER BY is_read ASC, created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM platform_v3.cm_notification WHERE recipient_id = #{recipientId} AND is_read = 'N'
mapper.update: UPDATE platform_v3.cm_notification SET is_read = 'Y', read_at = NOW() WHERE recipient_id = #{recipientId} AND is_read = 'N'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO platform_v3.cm_notification (recipient_id, doc_id, notification_type, channel, title, content, is_read, created_at) VALUES (#{recipientId}, #{docId}, #{notificationType}, #{channel}, #{title}, #{content}, 'N', NOW())
